finding: All application, data, gateway, security, management, and monitoring components are deployed in the single namespace job7189-ns.
zt_requirement: Split tiers into namespaces and apply least-privilege policies per tier.

finding: Seven Laravel backend services and one Next.js frontend are deployed by Helmfile.
zt_requirement: Assign workload identity and labels for every service.

finding: MySQL is shared as one internal service with logical databases per service; Kafka is configured with PLAINTEXT listeners; MinIO uses default-style static credentials.
zt_requirement: Restrict data access by service identity and encrypt/authenticate sensitive data flows.

finding: DB_PASSWORD, MINIO_SECRET, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_SECRET, MAIL_PASSWORD, and LARAVEL_INTERNAL_API_SECRET are present in Helm values/manifests.
zt_requirement: Move secrets to Vault dynamic/static secret management with TTL and rotation.

finding: Multiple management and data-adjacent UIs are exposed through NodePort: Kong, Keycloak, phpMyAdmin, Kafka UI, Kibana, MinIO API, and MinIO Console.
zt_requirement: Reduce public exposure and protect admin surfaces with explicit PEP and identity checks.

finding: No Kubernetes NetworkPolicy or CiliumNetworkPolicy is present in the DOAN2 manifests.
evidence: Search result over DOAN2/infras and DOAN2/k8s-management
zt_requirement: Apply default-deny and allow-list policies for North-South and East-West traffic.

finding: Laravel/Next.js deployment templates do not enforce runAsNonRoot, readOnlyRootFilesystem, capability drop, or seccomp; Filebeat uses hostNetwork and runAsUser 0.
zt_requirement: Use admission control, runtime policy, and hardened securityContext.

finding: No image signature verification, digest pinning, or admission policy is configured for application images.
zt_requirement: Verify image provenance with Sigstore/Cosign and admission policy.

finding: ELK/Filebeat centralizes application logs, but the old system has no network verdict telemetry or runtime syscall monitoring.
zt_requirement: Add Hubble/Cilium, Tetragon, Prometheus/Grafana, and security event correlation.
